8function%28%29%7Bz.textContent%3D%22Copy%20URL%22%7D%2C1500%29%7D%29%7D%2Cp.appendChild%28z%29%3Bvar%20R%3Ddocument.createElement%28%22button%22%29%3BR.textContent%3D%22Download%22%2CR.style.cssText%3D%22flex%3A1%3Bbackground%3Anone%3Bcolor%3A%23fff%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23333%3Bpadding%3A6px%200%3Bfont-family%3Ainherit%3Bfont-size%3A11px%3Bfont-weight%3A700%3Bcursor%3Apointer%22%2CR.onmouseover%3Dfunction%28%29%7BR.style.borderColor%3D%22%23555%22%7D%2CR.onmouseout%3Dfunction%28%29%7BR.style.borderColor%3D%22%23333%22%7D%2CR.onclick%3Dfunction%28%29%7Bvar%20e%3Ddocument.createElement%28%22a%22%29%3Be.href%3D_%2Ce.download%3D%28n%7C%7C%22profile%22%29%2B%22_hd.jpg%22%2Ce.click%28%29%7D%2Cp.appendChild%28R%29%7Delse%20h.textContent%3Dh.textContent%7C%7C%22Could%20not%20find%20HD%20profile%20picture.%22%7Delse%20y%28%22Error%22%2C%22Navigate%20to%20an%20Instagram%20profile%20first.%22%29%7D%28%29%3B
